script:
set +e
echo '=== BEFORE: credential ownership ==='
ls -la /home/*/.claude/.credentials.json 2>/dev/null
echo
echo '=== applying chown per affected user ==='
for u in afrah aixa alejandro ashley axel cameron david emily gabriel jesusr jose lia neil neilc rosi stephanie zahid; do
  if [ -d "/home/$u/.claude" ]; then
    chown -R "$u:$u" "/home/$u/.claude"
    echo "chowned /home/$u/.claude -> $u:$u"
  fi
done
echo
echo '=== AFTER: credential ownership ==='
ls -la /home/*/.claude/.credentials.json 2>/dev/null
echo
echo '=== test claude as aixa (sample) ==='
sudo -u aixa bash -c 'echo hi | timeout 45 /home/aixa/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --max-turns 1 --output-format text 2>&1' | head -8
echo '===END==='
